title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.915 - Council assigned to agency for technological-related assistance to individuals with disabilities
text:
161.915.  Council assigned to agency for technological-related assistance to individuals with disabilities. — The Missouri assistive technology advisory council is assigned to the lead agency for the Technology-Related Assistance for Individuals with Disabilities Act as designated by the governor so long as funds are available under such act.
(L. 1993 H.B. 589 § 2 subsec. 6, A.L. 1999 H.B. 201, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 191.857
